instruction: Change "two intertwined brown pretzels" to "two intertwined copper pretzels".
source_caption_short: two intertwined brown pretzels positioned above the cookie to represent the reindeer's antlers and two small round candies one red and one blue to depict the reindeer's eyes
source_caption_long: two intertwined brown pretzels positioned above the cookie to represent the reindeer's antlers and two small round candies one red and one blue to depict the reindeer's eyes
target_caption_long: two intertwined copper pretzels positioned above the cookie to represent the reindeer's antlers and two small round candies one red and one blue to depict the reindeer's eyes
